title: The Pinkan Pokémon Pack
description: Want to turn your Pokemon pink? Give it a Magost berry! 418 Pinkan forms so far! Seems like something special happens with shinies..🖤🤍
body:
Ever wanted to turn your Pokémon pink? Give it a Magost Berry and watch it turn pink! 🩷

It seems like it has a unique effect when given to shiny Pokémon.. 🖤🤍

✨418 retextures completed so far, 836 including shines!✨

## **🌟 Features 🌟**

⭐️ Every single starter Pokémon has Pinkan forms for its whole line, the ONLY exception are the Torterra unique trees. This includes Pikachu/Eevee as well as Ash Greninja, and Hisuian forms! (No megas yet, only officially added mons so far)

⭐️ EVERY SINGLE KANTO POKEMON IMPLEMENTED IN COBBLEMON HAS PINKAN FORMS!!! This includes the full evolution lines and variants as well.

⭐️ Every Pokémon that has a regional bias/difference also has a Pinkan form/Melanistic shiny for that, as well as the whole evolution line, such as Scizor and Kleavor for Scyther.

⭐️ Every texture is recolored manually! Yes it took forever!

⭐️ Most of the "extra" forms were created because the original official shiny is nearly unnoticeable. I wanted everyone to have options if they got one of these shinies!

⭐️ Rarely Albino: Only a few lines so far have Albino shinies, the rest being melanistic.

⭐️ The Tinkatink line has textures for the "dot" cosmetics, but we need to figure out how to make the magost berry consumable. For now, it's a held cosmetic item.

⭐ Gyarados Jump and it's shinies are now fully compatible (you can turn any pattern pinkan, but they're the default pinkan/black shiny colors)

⭐️ I'd love to add more forms in the future, but as of right now, I consider this pack completed! :]

### 
### ❗Known issue:

- An issue that comes up is turning off the Magikarp Jump Shiny Resource pack when having a shiny patterned Gyarados (regular, not pinkan) and it breaks the texture instead of defaulting to the regular red shiny. Giving it a Magost berry will correctly turn it to the black shiny coloration.

## **How to use:**
- Download (Unzipping Not Required)
- Copy file into your Resource Packs and Data Packs folders (Don't forget to add it to your world saves folder too!)
- Enable Resource Pack upon entering the world via the settings

Note: When enabling the resource pack, the game might flag the add-on as outdated. Ignore it and proceed, as it still works fine!

## **Cobblemon is required to use this mod!**

This is a collab between KuukiKookie and Nimbosaur!
